_meta.description: Maps lowercase keywords to image files for Easy Read documents.
_meta.usage: Look up a keyword to get { file, alt, source }. file is relative to /images/library/.

lawyer.desc: a handshake, symbolizing legal agreements and the role of a lawyer in facilitating them

piggy bank.desc: A piggy bank is often associated with saving money, similar to the concept of savings represented by the image of a pound banknote.

tools.desc: a thinking face — skills, which can metaphorically represent the concept of tools as skills are often seen as tools for achieving tasks

club.desc: Two silhouettes representing a group of people, similar to a club.

event.desc: A handshake can symbolize an event where people come together, such as a meeting or gathering.

discount.desc: a pound banknote — cheap, which can imply reduced prices or discounts
